index.name: CRISIL Liquid Fund Index
index.description: India's first (2003) and largest liquid ETF providing institutional-grade cash management via exchange-traded mechanism. LIQUIDBEES bridges gap between savings account (0.5% yield) and fixed deposits (6-7% yield with lock-in). Invests exclusively in 91-day-or-less instruments (T-bills, CPs, CDs) ensuring minimal interest rate risk. Daily rebalancing competes with money market funds, offering superior liquidity (trades NSE 09:15-15:30 with market-simulated pricing vs mutual funds settling T+1). Daily dividend reinvested as additional units creates compounding effect. Yield currently 6.5-7% (tracks RBI repo rate minus 10-30 bps). Perfect for traders needing overnight cash parking, corporations managing working capital, and retail investors seeking savings-like accessibility with money market returns. During RBI hike cycles, LIQUIDBEES yield rises synchronously; during cuts, yield compresses creating mark-to-market losses offset by lower coupon reinvestment rates.
